Chop suitable vegetables and add them together with spices or herbs to the prepared Orion PICKLES pot. Then cover the contents with the inner lid, close the pot with the outer lid and place a wooden skewer in the centre hole. Secure the attached rubber band behind the ears and then pull it over the shank. This will constantly put pressure on the inner lid and the vegetables inside. Thanks to the natural process of lactic fermentation, you will have a healthy snack or side dish ready within a few days. The 1.3 l PICKLES Orion vegetable pickling pot is made of ceramic and is dishwasher safe.
